creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
A search for gnucash returns 2 results

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=gnucash&stype=all
gnucash-guile1-2.6.19
gnucash-docs-2.6.19

but on https://www.freebsd.org/ports/finance.html
there are 3 results 
gnucash-docs-2.6.18
gnucash-guile1-2.6.18_1
gnucash-2.6.18_1

The ports.cgi script is missing the default gnucash-2.6.18_1 (guile2) package from FLAVORS
